case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. KIXCIA NEDENIA PERDOMO QUIROZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIXCIA NEDENIA PERDOMO QUIROZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUIROZ, KIXCIA NEDENIA PERDOMO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, KIXCIA NEDENIA PERDOMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT QUIROZ, KIXCIA NEDENIA PERDOMO
